name: com.dataclawe/dataclawe-mcp
title: DataClawe — Database as a Utility
description: DataClawe is an AI-native database utility. Talk to your database in plain language. No SQL, no setup, no server management. Connect AI agents (Claude, GPT, Cursor) directly to MySQL or PostgreSQL via DCL (DataClawe Command Language) — a simple JSON-based database standard. SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and more, just by describing what you need. From $20/month.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: DataClawe access key in Bearer format (e.g. 'Bearer dc_xxxxxxxxxxxx'). Get your access key at dataclawe.com
